title: SG19 2JW, Tamar Recycling (Suffolk) Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/BB3432AW/S005
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:    Operator name: Tamar Recycling (Suffolk) Limited   Installation name: Tempsford Composting Facility   Permit number: EPR/BB3432AW/S005   "
